name: SP8192 + Score-First TTT + QK-Gain 5.25 — Neural-Only 1.0810
author: G3sparky (Gavin Saunders)
blurb: Neural-only entry: legal score-first TTT (2-epoch SGD per chunk) on the SP8192 + 3-layer recurrence + parallel residuals stack. 8xH100 SXM, 3-seed mean 1.0810 BPB (std 0.0004). Also includes experimental PPM-D byte mixture (0.9727 on 8M subset, pending Issue #1872 ruling). Cross-platform verification: 1.0886 BPB on SDPA backend.

experimental_ppmd.note: PPM-D byte mixture (order-5) with anti-hijack gate. Evaluated on 8M token subset. In PPM-D class under Issue #1872 discussion.

cross_platform_verification.note: Same config trained with PyTorch SDPA instead of flash_attn_3. Verifies robustness across attention backends.

key_changes: Legal score-first TTT: 2-epoch SGD per chunk on quantized model (Issue #1017 C3 compliant)
Neural-only: no PPM-D required for headline 1.0810 result
Cross-platform verified: 1.0886 on SDPA, 1.0810 on flash_attn_3
Anti-hijack gate: suppress PPM when NN NLL < 0.277 nats
Deterministic LZMA bootstrap: source captured at startup
